title: PR Gate Check Payload v1
description: Output of release-readiness-check-payload: shape consumed by actions/github-script for github.rest.checks.create / checks.update. Status mapping: PASS -> success, WARN -> action_required, BLOCK / error -> failure. workflow_should_fail is the canonical signal for the enforcement step.

check_name.description: Name passed to github.rest.checks.create({name, ...}). Default 'release-readiness'; override via --check-name.

check_conclusion.description: GitHub Checks API conclusion value. action_required keeps the workflow green but blocks mergeable_state.

summary.description: Short human-readable summary line. May be empty.

text.description: Markdown body for the Check 'Details' page. Renders signals table, required actions, supporting detail, and footer.

workflow_should_fail.description: True when the calling workflow's enforcement step should exit non-zero. True for BLOCK and error payloads; false for PASS and WARN.

details_url.description: Workflow run URL passed to checks.create({details_url}). Null when the CLI was invoked without --run-url and without $GITHUB_RUN_URL.

final_gate_status.description: Mirrors final_gate.status from pr-gate-summary.json. ERROR indicates the input could not be parsed.
